log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Simic Hybrid — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:19+6=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Simic Hybrid — Winged Striker HP: 56/67
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Simic Hybrid — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Simic Hybrid — Winged Striker HP: 36/67
--- Simic Hybrid — Winged Striker --- HP: 36/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Simic Hybrid — Winged Striker.
→ Javelin: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Simic Hybrid — Winged Striker HP: 22/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
